title: Examples / Custom Extension Substrate / Schemas / Node Types.Example.Museum
summary: examples/custom-extension-substrate/schemas/node-types.example.museum.json is preserved as a raw protocol artifact in the XanaNode canonical substrate.
content:
{
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "namespace": "example.museum",
  "node_types": [
    {
      "id": "example.museum:artifact",
      "namespace": "example.museum",
      "type": "artifact",
      "label": "Artifact",
      "core": false,
      "extends": "xananode:media",
      "color": {
        "bg": "#d6a96b",
        "fg": "#1c1205",
        "outline": "#fff0d8"
      },
      "purpose": "A physical cultural object represented in a substrate.",
      "allowed_subtypes": [
        "tool",
        "manuscript",
        "object",
        "specimen",
        "machine"
      ],
      "required_frontmatter": [
        "title",
        "type",
        "importance",
        "summary",
        "relationships"
      ],
      "recommended_frontmatter": [
        "creator",
        "created_date",
        "current_location",
        "source_url",
        "rights_status"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
